creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

ports/INDEX is periodically updated by Satoshi Asami in order to prevent 
CVS spammage due to excessive updating and such.  The next such update 
will most likely be the last before 4.4-RELEASE.  In the meantime, there 
is no reasonable purpose in updating INDEX more often, sorry.
